title: The Melancholy of Angeline
overview: Angeline, the Black-Haired Valkyrie, longs for nothing more than a vacation to return to her home in the countryside and visit the father who taught her everything she knows about adventuring...but getting there will be an adventure all its own.

title: Belgrieve the Red Ogre
overview: Although Angeline has yet to make it home, tales of her deeds are reaching her father in the countryside. The noble Bordeaux family is also eagerly seeking out Belgrieve to show their gratitude after Angeline rescued their youngest sister.

title: Welcome Home, Angeline
overview: Angeline still hasn't been able to make it home to see her father. So when the local guild master tells her all that's standing between her and some time off is a potentially legendary monster, you can bet she's up for the challenge.

title: Quiet Days in Turnera with the Occasional Family Spat
overview: Angeline finally makes it back home with her friends in tow, but Belgrieve can hardly believe his ears when he hears how she introduces him. If Angeline says he's the Red Ogre and he says he's not, then which story is really true?

title: The Road to Bordeaux
overview: Father and daughter are finally reunited after five long years, so Angeline isn’t ready to be separated from Belgrieve just yet when a job comes in for him. She and her friends thus decide to tag along to Bordeaux, where an unexpected problem awaits.

title: Rebels Acting in Secret
overview: Belgrieve has caught wind of a plot brewing in Bordeaux, and the dark clouds roiling over the estate are a portent of things to come.

title: A Long Night and a Bright Dawn
overview: The attack on the Bordeaux estate has been suppressed for now, but the aftermath haunts the entire town. Has the danger truly passed? More dark clouds rolling in suggests otherwise...

title: Meeting the Inhabitants of the Woods
overview: Belgrieve is back at home, but trouble abounds even outside of Bordeaux. This "trouble" just happens to be a rogue elven princess who's out for demon blood.

title: Father and Daughter Meet New People
overview: Belgrieve continues to handle the trouble that's cropped up in the countryside. Meanwhile, Angeline stumbles upon trouble of her own in the city.

title: Wriggling Malice
overview: After their encounter in the city, Angeline takes on two surprising wards. Protecting people she cares about, however, turns out to be much harder than she ever expected.

title: Belgrieve's Decision
overview: Belgrieve and Angeline begin to enjoy the changes in their lives, but there's change on the horizon for them both. Will they cross paths again as they set out on new journeys?

title: Confronting the Past
overview: Angeline makes her grudging journey to the capital and quickly learns nobles are not to be underestimated. Meanwhile, Belgrieve has begun looking for something he thought he lost long ago.

title: I'm Home, Dad
overview: Angeline is in the capital to be honored, but she continues to struggle with the very idea. Belgrieve also continues to grapple with his past.
